title: Silky Smooth Portuguese Tortilla Wrap
description: A malty and silky Portuguese dish featuring flour tortilla and fry grind rice, perfect for a brunch mood, this lacto vegetarian friendly meal is a must try.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together malted barley flour, eggs, milk, salt, and black pepper.
Add cooked fry grind rice to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a large non stick skillet over medium heat and add butter.
Place a warm flour tortilla in the skillet and spoon the rice mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2 minutes or until the tortilla is lightly browned and the filling is heated through.
Flip the tortilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the other side is lightly browned.
Cut the tortilla wraps in half and serve hot.
